verdict_reasoning: SRC is a non-receptor tyrosine kinase anchored to the inner (cytoplasmic) leaflet of the plasma membrane and intracellular membranes via N-terminal myristoylation. Despite having a documented plasma membrane pool (dual localization via endocytic trafficking between perinuclear ERC and PM), this PM residence is exclusively on the cytoplasmic face. SRC has no transmembrane domain, is not secreted, undergoes no outer-leaflet-directed trafficking, and has no documented outer-leaflet display even in cancer or cell-death contexts. No cell-surface-directed therapeutic (antibody, CAR-T, ADC, bispecific) targets SRC at the extracellular surface. The protein functions entirely in cytoplasmic/intracellular signaling downstream of membrane-anchored receptors.
